notes: All 15 responses share a consistent OCR failure pattern: the website is read as 'www.registros.org' and the registry email as 'corralejo@registrodelaoliva.org' instead of the printed www.registradores.org / corralejo@registrodelapropriedad.org. Per the strict hallucination rules these are misreads of visible text and were recorded as key_misses, NOT hallucinations — no response invented content absent from the form. Quality is stable and highest at temp 0.1 (scores 6-7), degrades at 0.4 (5-6) and further at 0.7 (2-5). The single failure_mode outlier is t0.7/rep4, which collapses into a repetition loop of dot characters and truncates the closing legal paragraphs.
